Rules.HelpHtml:
FATE SCROLL

Devil's Pin is a tavern game of deadly precision, beloved in rough districts and among those unafraid of infernal bargains. The players throw darts at a wall board painted with the devil's face.

1. SETUP AND GOAL

  • Every player begins with an Infernal Debt of 10 points.
  • Goal: reduce that debt to 0.
  • The match lasts exactly 3 rounds, or until someone reaches zero early.

2. THROW RULES

The thrower stands 10 feet from the board. On each turn they declare a target:

👅 Tonguebase DC by the lowest participant level-1 debt
👃 Nosebase DC + 4-2 debt
🤘 Hornsbase DC + 8-3 debt

3. DEGREES OF SUCCESS

The game uses Pathfinder 2e degrees of success (critical at ±10 from the DC). Natural 20 and natural 1 shift the degree as usual.

  • 🌟 Nat 20 Uber: if the roll is already a critical success, halve the debt and then reduce it by double stakes.
  • 🎯 Critical Success: halve the debt, then reduce it by the target's stakes.
  • ✅ Success: reduce debt by the target's stakes.
  • ❌ Failure: increase debt by the target's stakes.
  • ⚠️ Critical Failure: double the debt, then add the target's stakes.
  • 💀 Nat 1 Uber: if the roll is already a critical failure, double the debt and add double stakes.

4. HARD RESTRICTIONS

  • Curse of Repetition: you cannot use the same skill twice in a row.
  • Changing the Mark: you cannot aim for the same face part in two consecutive rounds.
  • Equipment: standard darts are used; attack rolls usually rely on Dexterity for thrown weapons.

5. WINNER AND TIES

At the end of round three, the winner is the participant with the lowest debt. The winner takes a silver pot equal to the total remaining debts of all losers. If several players tie for the lowest debt, they split the pot evenly.

Status.ChooseTarget: Choose a skill and a target

Empty.JoinInstructions: Players mark "I'm in the game", then the GM clicks Start.
Empty.NoParticipants: There are no participants. Return to setup and mark players as participating.

UberCrit.Label: 🌟 Nat 20 Uber
UberCrit.Summary: Natural 20 and critical success: halve debt, then reduce it by double stakes.
UberCrit.Style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,223,122,0.30), rgba(120,30,20,0.25)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,223,122,0.55);

CriticalSuccess.Label: 🎯 Critical Success
CriticalSuccess.Summary: Halve debt, then reduce it by the target stakes.
CriticalSuccess.Style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(55,150,78,0.25), rgba(8,35,13,0.25)); border: 1px solid rgba(141,255,177,0.40);

Success.Label: ✅ Success
Success.Summary: Reduce debt by the target stakes.

Failure.Label: ❌ Failure
Failure.Summary: Increase debt by the target stakes.

CriticalFailure.Label: ⚠️ Critical Failure
CriticalFailure.Summary: Double debt, then add the target stakes.
CriticalFailure.Style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(110,18,18,0.32), rgba(40,5,5,0.25)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,139,139,0.40);

UberFailure.Label: 💀 Nat 1 Uber
UberFailure.Summary: Natural 1 and critical failure: double debt, then add double stakes.
UberFailure.Style: background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(140,8,8,0.40), rgba(35,0,0,0.30)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,95,95,0.55);

Log.TongueLock: Critical tongue failure: tongue is blocked next round.
Log.Win: {names} win the pot: {totalPot} SP
